T_S_CIL_1_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_S_CIL_2_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_S_CIL_3_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_S_CIL_4_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_CARTER_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_AMBIENTE_C.notes: Thermocouple type T + NI9213 selected mode.

T_RADIADOR_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_S_AGUA_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_WATERCOOLER_C.notes: Thermocouple type T + NI9213 selected mode.

T_ADMISSAO_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_E_TURB_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_S_TURB_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode.

T_E_COMP_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode. Reuses T_S_AGUA_C instrument stack.

T_S_COMP_C.notes: Thermocouple type K + NI9213 selected mode. Reuses T_S_AGUA_C instrument stack.

P_E_TURB_RAW_kPa.notes: Pressure sensor equipment uncertainty entered as +/-2.93 kPa via Instruments sheet.

P_S_TURB_RAW_kPa.notes: Pressure sensor equipment uncertainty entered as +/-2.93 kPa via Instruments sheet.

P_COLETOR_RAW_kPa.notes: Pressure sensor equipment uncertainty entered as +/-2.93 kPa via Instruments sheet.

P_S_COMP_RAW_kPa.notes: Pressure sensor equipment uncertainty entered as +/-2.93 kPa via Instruments sheet.

ETA_V_pct.notes: Volumetric efficiency using T_ADMISSAO, 101.3 kPa reference pressure, Rotação_mean_of_windows and 3.992 L displacement. Diesel uses MAF when valid.

instruments.key: Same logical key used in Mappings. Repeat key to stack components (RSS).
instruments.component:
Component name.
Example: TC_K_Class2, NI9213_CJC, transmitter, etc.
instruments.dist:
Distribution of the limit:
rect = uniform ±limit; normal = 1σ.
Recommended: rect.
instruments.range_min: Optional: apply component only if x >= range_min (in engineering unit).
instruments.range_max: Optional: apply component only if x <= range_max (in engineering unit).
instruments.acc_abs:
± absolute accuracy limit in engineering unit.
Example: ±2.5 °C -> 2.5.
instruments.digits:
± digits term (datasheet style). Use with lsd.
Example: ±2 digits -> 2.
instruments.lsd:
Least significant digit value in engineering unit.
Example: 0.1 °C per digit -> 0.1.
instruments.resolution:
Quantization step in engineering unit (optional).
Used as u_res = resolution/sqrt(12).
instruments.notes: Free notes. Use to document original datasheet wording.
migrated_from_model=percent_plus_digits
migrated_from_model=resolution_only
migrated_from_model=direct

reporting.key: Same logical key (from Mappings). One row per key.
reporting.report_digits:
Optional alternative to report_resolution.
If used, Python will derive rounding from digits.

plots.title: Air mass flow vs Power (all fuels)
Air mass flow vs Power (all fuels)
Specific fuel consumption vs Power (all fuels)
plots.notes: BSFC from Consumo_kg_h and power with propagated uncertainty from fuel and power channels.

plots.title: CO specific emissions vs Power (all fuels)
plots.notes: Specific CO emissions using dry gas analyzer and indirect H2O_wet_frac.

plots.title: CO2 specific emissions vs Power (all fuels)
plots.notes: Specific CO2 emissions using dry gas analyzer and indirect H2O_wet_frac.

plots.title: Volumetric fuel flow vs Power (all fuels)
plots.notes: Fuel volumetric flow from kg/h and density in Defaults

plots.title: Fuel cost vs Power (all fuels)
plots.notes: Fuel hourly cost from volumetric flow and cost in Defaults

plots.title: Hourly cost delta vs Diesel vs Power (negative = saving)
plots.notes: Signed hourly cost delta relative to diesel baseline. Negative values mean savings.

plots.title: Hourly cost delta vs Diesel vs Power (negative = saving)
plots.notes: Signed hourly cost delta relative to diesel baseline. Negative values mean savings.

plots.title: ECT control error (T_S_AGUA - DEM_TH2O) vs Power (all fuels)
Volumetric efficiency vs Power (all fuels)
plots.notes: ETA_V_pct uses T_ADMISSAO, sea-level pressure 101.3 kPa, Rotação_mean_of_windows, 3.992 L displacement, and MAF for diesel when valid.

plots.title: Exhaust water mass flow vs Power (all fuels)
plots.notes: Exhaust water mass flow from indirect H2O balance.

plots.title: Ignition delay (abs) vs UPD measured power (all fuels)
plots.notes: Added by request: abs(KIBOX_AI05_1 + Motec_Ignition Timing_mean_of_windows) with UPD power on X. | Y step set to 0.5 deg and X scale aligned with kibox (0..55 step 5).

plots.title: {y} vs {x} (all fuels)
plots.notes: AUTO: expand one plot per KIBOX_* column (except KIBOX_N_files)

plots.title: MoTeC fuel closed loop trim vs Load (all fuels)

plots.yerr_col: Motec_Fuel Closed Loop Control Bank 1 Trim_sd_of_windows

plots.title: MoTeC ignition advance vs Load (BTDC, all fuels)
plots.notes: Added by request: MoTeC ignition advance vs Load_kW with SD-only uncertainty and autoscale on Y. Y ticks: 1 deg autoscale.

plots.title: MoTeC lambda vs Load (all fuels)
plots.notes: Added by request: MoTeC exhaust lambda vs Load_kW with SD-only uncertainty and fixed lambda scale 0.90..1.10 step 0.02.
